chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 573 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.5523/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.5524/2023 (C/A) 09.05.2024 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Zahid Ali Shah, Mukhtiarkar Rohri and Saeed Ghanghro, Assistant Mukhtiarkar Rohri..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mukhtiarkar Rohri is present, has submitted compliance report, whereby demarcation of the land in terms of the previous order has been carried out and three quarters built on encroached land have been removed. A copy of the report has been given to the petitioner, who is satisfied, and both the applications are accordingly disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
